description: An open-source service for tracking the environmental footprint of electricity across Europe.

people.description: An individual who accesses and analyzes environmental impact data through wattnet.
people.name: User

softwareSystems.description: A third-party system or service that connects to wattnet to retrieve and use environmental impact data.

 monitoring dashboards.

components.description: Initializes the FastAPI server and manages the API lifecycle.

components.description: Handles requests related to system domain metrics, such as generation, import, export, footprint, flow share, mix share, footprint share and factors.
components.name: Generic Metric Controller

components.description: Contains the business logic for processing and retrieving environmental impact metrics.
components.name: Generic Metric Service

components.description: Provides geographical data and utilities related to latitudes, longitudes, and zone mapping.

components.description: Provides utilities for performing operations on time-series data, such as aggregation, filtering, and normalization.

relationships.description: Reads and writes rate limit counters
